name: abandoned-package-uncertain-sources
query: Is the npm package 'left-pad-router' still maintained and safe to add as a dependency for our routing layer?
expected_behavior: Checks the official package registry (npm) for last publish date and maintenance signals
Applies the Decision gates: if the package appears abandoned or docs cannot be confirmed, stops and reports the uncertainty rather than guessing
Does not recommend the package on popularity alone if it looks unmaintained
States explicitly if it appears abandoned rather than staying silent about it
_notes: Edge case: maintenance-status / possibly-abandoned-package check exercises the Decision gates and Gotchas sections, not just the happy-path comparison flow.
